66c60aeb30d1.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
66c60aeb30d1.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
66c60aeb30d1.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

8dca25dae9a0.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
8dca25dae9a0.description: At 2/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
8dca25dae9a0.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

4421658faec2.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
4421658faec2.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

ac4d70480666.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
ac4d70480666.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

a56d14c70b24.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
a56d14c70b24.description: You trail peers by 1.5 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

f1e21e3c7b08.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
f1e21e3c7b08.description: At 65 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
